intro.title: Paper CV
intro.description: Create a professional, structured, job-ready CV, automatically generated by AI in
intro.footer: Your CV will be saved and accessible at any time in your private Jobissim space.

steps.personnalisationDesc: Choose the title, design and color of your CV
steps.profilCandidatDesc: Personal information and type of contract sought
steps.interestsDesc: Interests, social networks, driving license and additional info
steps.competencesDesc: Selection of your key skills and languages
steps.generationDesc: AI automatically generates your presentation, experiences and training
steps.finalisationDesc: Add photo, video CV and validate the paper CV

skills.languagesHint: Choose a language then its level (max 5).
skills.selectDomain: Select a domain to see skills
skills.searchSoftSkill: Search or add a soft skill

smartGeneration.desc1: Introduce yourself freely in a few sentences. Say who you are, what you're looking for and what motivates you.
smartGeneration.desc2: Talk about your training, degrees or learning. Specify the name of the institution, the period and what you learned.
smartGeneration.desc3: Talk about your professional experience. For each experience, indicate where you worked, for how long and what you did concretely.
smartGeneration.example1: My name is Lucie, I'm looking for a position in retail in Paris and the surrounding area. Dynamic, friendly and comfortable with customer contact, I enjoy advising, selling and contributing to a good in-store experience.
smartGeneration.example2: I completed a retail training course at [institution name] between 2008 and 2010. I learned to welcome and advise customers, to showcase products and to master the basics of sales.
smartGeneration.example3: I worked as a sales assistant at [company name] from 2018 to 2022. I welcomed customers, advised them on their purchases and handled shelf stocking. This experience strengthened my customer service, sales and contact skills.
smartGeneration.speakInstruction: Respond orally or in writing. The AI automatically structures your CV.
smartGeneration.overwriteMessage: This action will replace the existing recording for this step. Do you want to continue?

finalization.ready: Your CV is ready. You can add a photo and video CV.
finalization.photoVideoDesc: Add a profile photo and link a video CV
finalization.qrHint: Scan the QR code to retrieve your CV. It remains available at any time in your private space on
finalization.videoHint: This video CV will be accessible via the CV QR code.
finalization.exitTitle: Do you really want to go back home?
finalization.exitMessage: You can always edit your CV from the Jobissim site.
finalization.pdfNotReady: The PDF is not yet available.
finalization.analyzePdfError: Unable to retrieve the CV PDF.
andyMessages: Hi! I can analyze your CV and give you ideas to improve it. Want me to take a look?
Hey! I have an idea: let me analyze your CV and I'll give you feedback with personalized recommendations.
Hello! Would you like me to analyze your CV? I'll give you strengths and areas for improvement.
Hi! I suggest going through your CV carefully to help you make it even more impactful.
Hello! If you'd like, I'll analyze your CV and give you detailed feedback with my recommendations.
Hey! I can analyze your CV and give you tips to boost it. Sound good?
Hello! Let me analyze your CV and I'll give you concrete ideas for improvement.
Hi! Would you like me to review your CV? I'll suggest targeted improvements.
Hello! I can analyze your CV and give you structured feedback: strengths and areas for improvement.

photo.descriptionResumePhoto: This photo will be used on your paper CV.
photo.descriptionVideoPhoto: This image will be displayed as the thumbnail of your video.

common.logoutConfirm: Do you really want to log out?
